name: Baked Stuffed Fish
recipeIngredient: 2 cups soft bread cubes (about 1/2 inch cubes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all the ingredients together.
2. Roll up in fish fillets, securing them with toothpicks.
3. Divide into four or five pieces.
4. Bake at 400°F for 30 minutes.
5. During the last 10 minutes of baking, pour Newburg sauce over the fish.
It's good with flounder, but any white fish will do. I've used large cod and catfish fillets and butterflied them. Just enough so you can roll it up over the stuffing.
